text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret the visual world. One of its main functions is image recognition, where a computer identifies objects, people, or scenes in photos. Object detection goes a step further, locating specific items within an image, such as a pedestrian or a traffic sign. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognize lanes, avoid obstacles, and detect other vehicles on the road. It is also used in security systems, medical imaging, and smartphone cameras to improve accuracy and safety.
